channel.title: Playground on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Playground on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Document PII playground sample in Microsoft Foundry NextGen
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry NextGen now includes a public preview playground for document-based PII detection in Azure AI Language. The sample loads a prepared document, runs document PII detection, and displays the redacted output.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Document PII NextGen Playground in Azure AI Language
item.description:
Azure AI Language’s Document PII NextGen Playground is now generally available. It provides a refreshed experience for evaluating document PII detection with curated sample inputs and outputs.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: TextPII NextGen Playground updates in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry’s public preview TextPII NextGen Playground has been updated with a refreshed API Configuration Panel and preview features introduced at Ignite 2025. Developers can use it to test predefined PII categories and redaction behavior.

  • Source: Azure Updates
